description: Verifies the EventHub login flow. The login page at /login presents a single 'Sign in to EventHub' card with an Email field (placeholder 'you@email.com'), a Password field (placeholder '••••••'), and a 'Sign In' button. A valid login (POST to /api/auth/login returns 200) redirects the user to the home page '/' which renders the navigation bar with the user's email and a 'Logout' button. A failed login keeps the user on /login; the API returns HTTP 400 for invalid credentials and the form offers no inline success state.

testCases.title: Valid credentials sign the user in and land on the home page
preconditions: Browser is at default desktop viewport
steps: Step 2: Enter 'manish123@gmail.com' in the Email textbox (placeholder 'you@email.com')
Step 3: Enter 'Manish9@@' in the Password textbox (placeholder '••••••')
Step 5: Wait for the page to navigate away from /login
testCases.expectedResult: The browser navigates to https://eventhub.rahulshettyacademy.com/ (home page), the top navigation shows the user's email 'manish123@gmail.com' and a 'Logout' button, and the 'Featured Events' section is visible.

testCases.title: Invalid password keeps the user on /login with no successful navigation
steps: Step 2: Enter 'manish123@gmail.com' in the Email textbox
Step 3: Enter 'WrongPass@999' in the Password textbox
Step 5: Wait briefly for the network response
testCases.expectedResult: The browser stays on https://eventhub.rahulshettyacademy.com/login (URL is unchanged), the POST to /api/auth/login returns HTTP 400, and the home page is NOT loaded (no 'Featured Events' heading and no 'Logout' button are visible).

testCases.title: Empty email and empty password block submission (boundary / required-field case)
steps: Step 2: Leave the Email textbox empty (do not type anything)
Step 3: Leave the Password textbox empty (do not type anything)
testCases.expectedResult: The browser stays on https://eventhub.rahulshettyacademy.com/login. The Email field is flagged as required by the browser (HTML5 'Please fill out this field' validation message or 'valueMissing' state), no POST request to /api/auth/login is sent, and the user is not redirected to the home page.

testCases.title: SQL-injection-style input in Email and Password does not bypass authentication
steps: Step 2: Enter '' OR ''1''=''1' in the Email textbox (literal string: single-quote, space, OR, space, single-quote, 1, single-quote, equals, single-quote, 1)
Step 3: Enter '' OR ''1''=''1' in the Password textbox (same literal string)
Step 5: Wait briefly for the network response
testCases.expectedResult: The browser stays on https://eventhub.rahulshettyacademy.com/login. The login API responds with HTTP 400 (the same way as a normal failed login), the home page is NOT loaded, and no 'Logout' button or user email is shown in the navigation.
